description: You are a university instructor. Format the CS 3301 course syllabus for the Fall 2025 semester located at /home/ga/Documents/cs3301_syllabus.odt according to the university syllabus formatting guide at /home/ga/Desktop/syllabus_formatting_guide.txt. The formatted document must include a proper title block, heading styles for sections and subsections, three structured tables (course information, weekly schedule, and grading breakdown) converted from the inline text, and the specified body text formatting. Save the changes to /home/ga/Documents/cs3301_syllabus.odt.

body_samples: This course provides a comprehensive introduction
Students must adhere to the Westfield State University
Regular attendance at lectures and labs is expected
